香港體育館 (紅館) Hong Kong Coliseum /
9-12, 14-17, 19-22, 24-27, 29-31.12.2019 & 1.1.2020

門票開售日期 Ticket sale starts: 10.9.2019 (星期二 Tue) / 10 am

共20場演出，約58 000門票於城市售票網公開發售
A total of 20 performances with about 58 000 tickets available for public sale at URBTIX

您亦可使用信用卡電話訂票熱線（852）2111 5999（每日上午十時至晚上八時）或於各售票處開放時間內前往購票（請注意：陳奕迅演唱會2019不設售票處售票）。
You may also use our credit card telephone booking hotline at (852) 2111 5999 (from 10 am to 8 pm daily) or visit our outlets during their opening hours (Note: there is no counter booking for Eason Chan in concert 2019).
